task_completion.description: Verify that the Security Lead Time for Sales is enabled and set to 2 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Odoo Settings page (Inventory or Sales section), the checkbox for 'Security Lead Time for Sales' is checked and the value is set to '2' days.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Security Lead Time for Purchase is enabled and set to 3 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Odoo Settings page (Inventory or Purchase section), the checkbox for 'Security Lead Time for Purchase' is checked and the value is set to '3' days.

On the product page for 'STM32F401 Microcontroller' (COMP-MCU-STM32), the 'Customer Lead Time' is set to 7 days. Under the Purchase tab, there is a vendor line for 'GlobalTech Industries' with a 'Delivery Lead Time' of 15 days.

task_completion.description: Verify lead times for 'ESP32-WROOM-32 WiFi Module'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the product page for 'ESP32-WROOM-32 WiFi Module' (COMP-WIFI-ESP32), the 'Customer Lead Time' is set to 7 days. Under the Purchase tab, there is a vendor line for 'GlobalTech Industries' with a 'Delivery Lead Time' of 15 days.

task_completion.description: Verify lead times for 'Raspberry Pi Compute Module 4'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the product page for 'Raspberry Pi Compute Module 4' (COMP-SBC-RPI4), the 'Customer Lead Time' is set to 7 days. Under the Purchase tab, there is a vendor line for 'GlobalTech Industries' with a 'Delivery Lead Time' of 15 days.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web application in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings and product pages appear in a saved state (e.g., 'Save' button was clicked, no unsaved changes indicators).
